window.title: Two players will respectively lay white discs or black discs one by one. Whoever lays down 5 in a row first is the winner.
1. Players will lay down discs turn by turn. The player with the black discs goes first.
2. Click anywhere on the board and then left click it to lay down disc.
Whoever lays 5 discs in a row, whether it is horizontal, vertical, or diagonal will be the winner
1.3 Free: The other player didn't block you from getting 3 in a row. You can get 4 in a row if your target is not aware yet. And then you will win.
2. 4 more: The other player hasn't noticed you now have 4 in a row. Both sides can't be blocked, so you will win. Congratulations.
3. Poor 4: The other player has blocked one side. You may still win if the other player doesn't block the other side.
1. move: Move the cursor on the board to choose placement location
2. lay: Left click the chessboard to lay down the disc.
3. yeild: You can end the present game by clicking yeild.
Big-2 is a popular card game. The biggest number in the game is 2.
There can be 2-4 players playing at the same time. It is simple. You need to play a bigger number card than the last player. Whoever lays out all their cards will be the winner.
1. A player who has a club 3 can go first and then the other players follow in turn counter-clockwise.
2. You should play the same type of cards when it is your turn.
3. Your card should be bigger than the last card.
5. If the number of cards are same, it is according to the type of the cards.
6. type of card order is: spade ＞Heart＞Diamond ＞Club
7. If your card is not bigger than your target, you have to give up the game.
1. Single card: According to the number or the type
2. A Pair: Two card of the same number. According to the number or the suit
3. Straight: 5 cards whose numbers are continual. According to the biggest card's number and type.
4. Full House: 5 cards. [3 cards of the same number] and [a pair]. According to the numbers of the 3 cards.
5. 4 of a kind. [4 cards of the same number] and a [single card]. According to the numbers of the 4 cards.
6. Straight Flush: 5 cards whose numbers are continual and of the same suit. According to the number and the type of the biggest card.
1. Choose a card: Click the cards you want and they will be raised up slightly above the other cards, such as the diamond Q in the picture.
2. Cancel card choices: Click the raised card you already chose. It will cancel the card, such as the Diamond Q in the picture.
3. Play a card: Click the button [Play] to play the card you have chosen, such as in picture A.
4. Pass: Click the button [Pass] to give up playing the card, such as in picture B.
Warning: The character will be deleted after 8 hours. Are you sure you want to delete it?
Dear Angels, the data here can help you to know more about your friends in the Angel world.
Face
window.tooltext: can upload bmp, jpg, tga,png and so on

window.title: Face
window.tooltext: can upload bmp, jpg, tga,png and so on

window.title: Face
window.tooltext: can upload bmp, jpg, tga,png and so on

window.title: Are you sure you want to stop manufacturing?
Do you accept this agreement? The game will end if you choose [disagree]. You should choose [Agree] to continue your game.
It will cover the original effect.
自動使用輔助技能或道具
window.tooltext: 開啟自動使用輔助技能功能
增加(存入)輔助技能項目

window.title: 自己
window.tooltext: 輔助技能的目標包含自己

window.title: 隊友
window.tooltext: 輔助技能的目標包含隊友

window.title: 自己的寵物
window.tooltext: 輔助技能的目標包含自己的寵物

window.title: 隊友的寵物
window.tooltext: 輔助技能的目標包含隊友的寵物

window.title: 原地重複練習技能
window.tooltext: 開啟原地重複練習技能(注意：會影響到打怪)

window.title: 自動幫忙復活
window.tooltext: 開啟自動幫忙復活(自己必須有復活法術)

window.title: 被復活時自動回答
window.tooltext: 自己死亡,被別人復活時,自動回答同意或拒絕

window.title: 開啟天使守護精靈
window.tooltext: 開啟或暫停天使守護精靈[Alt+D]

window.title: 自動採集
window.tooltext: 設定採集中心點,並開啟自動採集功能 (會關閉自動攻擊)

window.title: 名稱
window.tooltext: 自行輸入指定採集目標

window.title: 確定將這張卡片加入集卡冊？
一二三四五六七八九十一二三四五六
一二三四五六七八九十一二三四五一二三四五六七八九十一二三四五一二三四五六七八九十一二三四五一二三四五六七八九十一二三四五
一二三四五六七八九十一二三四五六

/c#00F7FF【集卡冊說明】/c*
 1.右鍵點選卡片即可將卡片貼入集卡冊當中，已經貼過的卡片將不能再貼入。
 2.熱鍵【/c#EEFF33Alt+C/c*】可直接打開集卡冊觀賞卡片。
 3.集卡冊內分成/c#EEFF33套卡/c*及/c#EEFF33卡片列表/c*。/c#EEFF33套卡/c*是以套卡的方式排列卡片，以便觀看套
 卡所需卡片及獎賞；/c#EEFF33卡片列表/c*是將所有卡片全部列出來，以便搜索需要觀看
 的卡片。
 4.集卡冊卡片列表的下方有/c#EEFF33卡片取得提示/c*以及/c#EEFF33套卡簡易說明/c*。
 
/c#00F7FF【卡片介面說明】/c*（請參考右側圖）
 1./c#00F7FF卡片編號/c*：每張卡片都有的專屬獨立編號，可供查詢、排序之用。
 2./c#00F7FF卡片名稱/c*：對應卡片主題的名稱。
 3./c#00F7FF星等/c*：以星等區分卡片等級，與卡片本身價值以及取得難易度有關。
 /c#EEFF33星等顏色/c*區分為/c#EEFF33白色/c*、/c#EEFF33藍色/c*以及/c#EEFF33金色/c*三色。星等級數例子：/c#EEFF33…＜4顆白星＜
 5顆白星＜1顆藍星＜2顆藍星＜…＜5顆藍星＜1顆金星＜2顆金星＜…/c*。
 4./c#00F7FF卡片主題圖/c*：卡片主題圖與卡片名稱相呼應。
 5./c#00F7FF卡片顏色/c*：卡片總共分成四大類別，卡片顏色與類別相對應。分別為：/c#EEFF33一般
 怪物/c*→/c#EEFF33紅色/c*、/c#EEFF33特殊怪物/c*→/c#EEFF33黑色/c*、/c#EEFF33人物場景/c*→/c#EEFF33綠色/c*、/c#EEFF33裝備道具/c*→/c#EEFF33白色/c*。
 6./c#00F7FF卡片說明/c*：對該卡片主題作簡短的說明。
 
/c#00F7FF【套卡介面說明】/c*
 1.獎賞取得辦法：集滿套卡可取得獎賞，方式有二︰/c#EEFF33好禮請選一/c*表示下列獎品
 當中選擇其中一個；/c#EEFF33獎賞通通送/c*表示下列獎賞全部送給集滿卡片的小天使。
 2.兌換按鈕：只要收集滿該套卡的卡片，即可按下取得卡片。若取得辦法為擇
 一必須先選擇你要的獎賞。
 3.套卡獎賞：套卡介面最下面列出該套卡集滿可獲得或可選擇的獎賞，套卡獎
 賞只可兌換一次。
